data.title: New MARA Foundation supports Bitcoin network and vows $100,000 to voted Bitcoin company for adoption and growth.
data.description: The MARA Foundation is seeking community input for the selection of one out of three Bitcoin companies to receive a $100,000 contribution as part of its launch.

data.title: Bitcoin retesting $76,500 as support, with bulls in control as longs outnumber shorts. Range highs key for bullish bias.
data.description: Bitcoin dropped to revisit the $76,500 mark as a potential support level. However, an analysis of the long-to-short ratio suggests that bulls hold a notable edge if the cryptocurrency manages to reclaim its range highs.
The Philippine currency extended losses, touching a new all-time low of 60.993 per dollar.
Thailand’s 2026 economic growth is now seen at 1.6%, compared with 2.0% previously, according to the finance ministry.
30-year JGB yields declined 3.5 basis points, reaching 3.640%.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) gains 4.8%, with 199% CVD surge, signaling high buying activity amidst a drop in speculation.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has risen by 4.8%, accompanied by a significant surge of 199% in spot CVD. This surge in spot CVD suggests a substantial increase in buying pressure for Bitcoin, even as speculative activity has decreased.

data.title: Stablecoins are revolutionizing finance with rapid payments, improved cross-border transactions, and advanced onchain infrastructure.
data.description: Stablecoins are playing a pivotal role in revolutionizing the financial sector by offering expedited payment processes, enhancing cross-border transactions, and establishing a cutting-edge on-chain infrastructure for global banking and credit services. These digital assets are facilitating faster payments and ensuring greater efficiency in international transfers, thereby reshaping the foundations of traditional banking systems. This transformation is powered by a new on-chain stack that is redefining the way financial services are accessed and utilized on a global scale.

data.title: EcoOnline Report: 92% of Workers Say Safety Boosts Productivity, but Operational Risks Are Undermining Retention and Business Growth
data.description: A recent report from EcoOnline, titled the 2026 North America Workplace Safety Report, provides valuable insights based on feedback from a total of 1,200 workers. The report focuses on various aspects such as safety, productivity, retention, and operational resilience in the workplace.
JP Morgan reduced its price target for Domino's Pizza from $440 to $430.

data.title: Peter Brandt Says Those Who Predict Bitcoin At $250,000 'Need To Stop With The Mushrooms' As Arthur Hayes Slashes Year-End Forecast
data.description: Experienced trader Peter Brandt recently cautioned Bitcoin enthusiasts who were foreseeing the price reaching $250,000 by 2026 to moderate their expectations and consider more realistic goals. Brandt, a technical analyst with almost half a century of market experience, pointed out that Bitcoin has been trading within a specific channel pattern since late 2025, stating that it is not indicative of a bullish bottoming pattern. He advised against overly optimistic projections, suggesting that those aiming for a $250,000 price target in 2026 should reassess their assumptions. The analysis was shared via a tweet by The Factor Report, emphasizing the importance of focusing on accurate price assessments rather than relying on speculative predictions. Brandt's insights serve as a reminder to investors to approach market forecasts with caution and avoid being swayed by overly ambitious projections.

data.title: MarinHealth Launches New Women’s Lifelong Health and Wellness Clinic to Support Women Through Midlife and Beyond
data.description: In Greenbrae, California, MarinHealth has introduced the Women’s Lifelong Health and Wellness Clinic focusing on women's health needs during midlife and beyond. Led by Lizellen La Follette, MD, the clinic offers tailored consultations and care for women encountering menopause symptoms and other health challenges. This program addresses hormonal, cardiovascular, metabolic, mental, and preventive health issues that arise in this stage of life. The initiative aims to support women through personalized services to maintain overall well-being.

data.title: Canada’s prime minister says economic ties with US are a weakness that must be corrected
data.description: Mark Carney emphasized the importance of self-reliance in a recent video address, stating, "We must prioritize taking care of ourselves as we cannot depend solely on one international partner." He highlighted the unpredictable nature of disruptions from neighboring countries, underlining the necessity of being self-sufficient.

data.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
data.description: President Donald Trump has continuously made bold decisions that risked destabilizing the American economy. The recent crisis with Iran is the latest challenge to test the U.S. economic strength. The situation has raised concerns about potential impacts on key economic indicators, including stock market performance, trade stability, and overall financial security. This development adds to a series of high-stakes events that have put economic stability in the spotlight during Trump's administration.

data.title: WaterField Designs Introduces Magnetic Gaming Case for Lenovo Legion Go 2 Handheld
data.description: A San Francisco-based company is broadening its range of handcrafted cases by introducing a custom-fit option designed specifically for Lenovo's flagship Windows gaming handheld. The case is crafted from premium materials and features a magnetic closure and charge-through functionality, catering to the needs of high-value gaming devices like the Lenovo Legion Go 2. This expansion showcases the company's commitment to providing protection and accessibility for top-tier gaming gadgets.
RBC lifted its price target for Prologis from $135 to $148.
